tasks.subject: Task 1: File Link Provider in useTerminal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register a custom link provider that detects relative file paths in terminal output, validates them on hover, and activates on Cmd+click.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/composables/useTerminal.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Relative paths with extensions and at least one `/` are detected
- [ ] Paths are validated via `file_exists` before being offered as links
- [ ] Validation results are cached per terminal instance
- [ ] Only Cmd+click activates the link
- [ ] A `file-link-activate` CustomEvent is dispatched on the terminal container
- [ ] Tooltip shows "Open preview (Cmd+click)" on hover
- [ ] Link provider is only registered when `worktreePath` is provided
- [ ] Cache is cleared on dispose

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/composables/useTerminal.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file paths detected", "validation on hover", "cache", "cmd+click activation", "custom event dispatch", "tooltip", "conditional registration", "cache cleared on dispose"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Thread worktreePath through components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pass `worktreePath` from TerminalTabs through TerminalView to `useTerminal`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/components/TerminalView.vue`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/components/TerminalTabs.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TerminalView accepts a `worktreePath` prop
- [ ] TerminalView passes it to `useTerminal` via `options.worktreePath`
- [ ] TerminalTabs passes `worktreePath` from session config to TerminalView

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/TerminalView.vue", "apps/desktop/src/components/TerminalTabs.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TerminalView prop added", "passed to useTerminal", "TerminalTabs passes through"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire App.vue to open file preview from terminal links
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Catch the `file-link-activate` event and open the file preview modal at the indicated line.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/App.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `file-link-activate` event opens file preview modal with correct path
- [ ] `previewInitialLine` is set from event line number
- [ ] `initialLine` prop passed to FilePreviewModal
- [ ] Opening from file picker / tree explorer clears `initialLine`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/App.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["event listener works", "initialLine set", "prop passed", "cleared from other sources"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Scroll-to-line and highlight in FilePreviewModal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When `initialLine` is provided, scroll to that line and highlight it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/components/FilePreviewModal.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `initialLine` prop accepted
- [ ] After content loads, scrolls to center the target line
- [ ] Target line gets highlight animation (1.5s fade)
- [ ] Lines tagged with `data-line` via shiki transformer
- [ ] No change when `initialLine` not provided
- [ ] Line numbers auto-enabled when `initialLine` provided

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/FilePreviewModal.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prop accepted", "scroll to line", "highlight animation", "data-line attributes", "unchanged without prop", "auto line numbers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Type check and final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run type checks and fix any issues across all changed files.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `bun tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] HTTP/HTTPS links still work
- [ ] Shell modals unaffected

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["type check passes", "URL links work", "shell modals unaffected"]}
```
